assertions.assertion: Output must address ownership ambiguity explicitly
Output must mention both CI systems by name (CircleCI and GitHub Actions)
Output must give at least one short-term action item that is actionable despite the chaos
Output must score Ownership & culture at 2/5 or lower
assertions.evidence: Ownership & culture  | 2/5   | High turnover rate among engineering leaders; currently no product owner assigned.

assertions.assertion: Output must not recommend a full team reorganisation
assertions.evidence: Establish formal incident tracking, monitoring, and reporting system.
